description: Click is a Python package for creating beautiful command line interfaces in a composable way.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/click && python3 click.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/click && python3 click.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/click && python3 click.py --help`. Python composable command line interface toolkit.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the utility category. Fits when the engagement needs: Python composable command line interface toolkit.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Python composable command line interface toolkit.

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.
